title: Glossy Glazed Spanish Fish Ceviche
description: A tangy and indulgent Spanish dish featuring sashimi-cut fish, sugar syrup, and a touch of Andalusian flair, all prepared in a Dutch oven.
instructions: Prepare the sugar syrup by heating it in the Dutch oven over low heat until warm and runny.
Add the sashimi-cut sea bass to the Dutch oven and pour the warm sugar syrup over the top.
Drizzle the fresh lemon juice and olive oil over the sea bass, making sure each piece is well coated.
Sprinkle the minced garlic, chopped cilantro, salt, and black pepper over the top of the sea bass.
Cover the Dutch oven with a lid and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, give the mixture a good stir and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the ceviche chilled, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
Discard any leftover ceviche after 24 hours.
